title: trichocentrum oerstedii
intro: Trichocentrum oerstedii, commonly known as the "Yellow Egger orchid", is a species of orchid native to tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is prized for its vibrant yellow flowers and has been used in traditional medicine to promote various health benefits. The therapeutic actions of Trichocentrum oerstedii include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which can aid in wound healing and the treatment of infections. The bioactive constituents of Trichocentrum oerstedii include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties and potential health benefits.
